kinesisanalyticsv2.application.monitorin.Docs: Describes whether to use the default CloudWatch logging configuration for an application. You must set this property to `CUSTOM` in order to set the `LogLevel` or `MetricsLevel` parameters.
Describes the verbosity of the CloudWatch Logs for an application.
Describes the granularity of the CloudWatch Logs for an application. The `Parallelism` level is not recommended for applications with a Parallelism over 64 due to excessive costs.
